summary: 2-3 sentence assessment (safe to merge / merge with fixes / needs rework)

checklist.evidence: One sentence — file:line or logic trace

findings.title: Short title (5-8 words)
findings.description: What is wrong and why it matters in production
findings.cause: Root cause — trace the code path
findings.suggested_code: Exact replacement for the flagged line(s) when a mechanical fix applies (one-click GitHub suggestion); else empty string
